companies.name: Allstate

_notes: Favicon-size logos (geico, farmers, nationwide): 128-256px, usable for card headers but may look pixelated on print.
For print-quality logos: visit each company's press/media page to download brand asset PDFs/SVGs.
Allstate requires manual download due to bot protection blocking automated fetch.
Liberty Mutual SVG is 0 bytes — only the GIF and small PNG are available.
